user_feedback: can you move the ball a bit further up so that its mnore in the center, right now its kind of close tot eh bottom so its ard to foresee the future path
analysis:
- Issue identified: The player ball is positioned too low on the screen (offset by +100px downwards), limiting the view of the future path which generates downwards in screen space.
- Files affected: `iso_math.js`
- Changes needed: In `applyCamera` function, remove the vertical offset (+100) added to `cy`. This will align the camera target (player) with the vertical center of the canvas, effectively moving the ball up and revealing more of the path ahead.
